college_info.college_name: Kalyan Post Graduate College, Bhilai Nagar: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Institute offers 42 courses which is Degree. Institute offers UG and PG courses. Kalyan Post Graduate College, Bhilai Nagar offers UGand PG courses. When it comes to choosing a good institute for UG and PG courses Kalyan Post Graduate College, Bhilai Nagar comes to mind. They gave opportunity to student to choose courses like B.A., B.Com, BCA, BBA, B.Ed, B.Lib.I.Sc., B.J.M.C., PGDCA, MBA/PGDM, PG Diploma, UG Diploma, M.A., M.Sc., M.Com, M.Ed, B.Sc. with stream of Humanities & Social Sciences, Accounting & Commerce, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies, Teaching & Education, Mass Communication & Media, Science. From introductory courses to more advanced topics, there is a variety of courses to choose from. Kalyan Post Graduate College, Bhilai Nagar offered courses and their fee ranged INR 13,000-87,350 for a total of 710 seats. Kalyan Post Graduate College, Bhilai Nagar provide good facilities all around the campus like Auditorium, Cafeteria, Girls Hostel, Gym, Hospital / Medical Facilities, Hostel, Labs, Library, Sports Complex.

reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with faculty and infrastructure, but placements could improve.

review_content.Placements: The quality of my college placement support is decent but not stellar, around 30-50 percent of civil students land on-campus offers. Companies like TCS, Wipro, ServiceNow and Accenture visit for recruitment. Average packages range between 3 LPA to 9 LPA with top performers landing up 8 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: My college campus feels modern and clean with spacious classrooms, smart labs and well-maintained civil engineering facilities. In my civil department, there's a dedicated lab for surveying, concrete, hydraulics, and practical tools are available. The library is equipped with digital resources and physical books, and the overall vibe is green and pleasant.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Chemistry, Mathematics, Physics - Batch of 2021

review_content.Placements: The placement cell is not very good, but you will have some opportunities to improve your C. V. through extracurricular activities provided by the college. It also has an NCC or NSS cell, which prepares you for jobs in the police or army, as well as other facilities.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is old, so the infrastructure isn't great, but the libraries are fine, with a good collection of books. Wi-Fi is available 24/7 and with good speed. Classrooms are also nice.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members aren't all that great. M.Sc. freshers come and teach you and not a single one can answer your good questions because they are not creative and just copy from books and dictate it. But 1-2 are fine with good behaviour but they cannot grow your creativity.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Computer Science, Mathematics, Physics - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: This college is a wrong decision for you, so I suggest you choose other colleges.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements for students. This college is very worst in all fields. Teachers of this college have more ego, and they are not familiar with students. This college environment is suitable only for government jobs. This college is also not good at behaviour.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, but teachers do not have the knowledge to use it. The college is Wi-Fi enabled, but it is a myth. Labs are very bad for all fields. I am from computer science, and the condition of CS lab computers is very bad. Mostly, programmes do not run perfectly.

reviews_list.review_title: The teaching and education quality are good.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not available in this college. The college management does not make any decisions for this. I hope in future, it will be available. Students can get an easy platform for their career.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are good. All the courses are available. The library, classrooms, internet connection, Wi-Fi, hostel, a good canteen and medical facilities are available. Sports and games are played during the college fest every December.
review_content.Faculty: All the teachers are well-educated and knowledgeable. Some teachers teach very well. They are friendly. This course is relevant, and many opportunities are available in other places. They help us build confidence. Teachers are helpful.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Biotechnology, Botany, Chemistry - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: A great college with no stress.

review_content.Placements: There are no college placements. There's no salary, no company comes for campus placement. There are no internship opportunities you have to find your internship for certificate. There's no top roles in these colleges. Overall, there is no placement to be honest you go to the college and tell you the same thing.
review_content.Infrastructure: Overall, infrastructure is good but still need to update their instruments and chemicals. They have separate lab areas for performing the test and practicals. Sports and NCC are good in college. I am a day scholar student so I don't know hostel facilities but from outside it looks good not that bad.

reviews_list.review_title: A good college for every student.

review_content.Placements: College is known for its reputation and discipline. Around 60% of students will get placement. Many companies come to college, and students attend placement sessions in college. It's one of the best colleges in Durg. Once, students should look into the college once.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful. They help students all times in college. Semester exams are difficult, but teachers give as their best experience in class, so students never feel that papers are hard. Students can easily clear exams.

highlights.summary: Kishkinda University Ballari admissions are open for the year 2026.

faqs.question: Is Kishkinda University, Ballari a good college for MBA?
faqs.answer: Kishkinda University Ballari MBA course is offered for 2 years. The University offers an MBA based on entrance and merit. Candidates must obtain valid merit scores as well as entrance scores or percentile to be eligible for admission to KU Ballari. The University offers an MBA for a total tuition fee of INR 1.80 Lakh. The average package of an MBA graduate is recorded as INR 4.50 Lakh. To conclude, Kishkinda University Ballari can be considered a good University for an MBA.

faqs.question: What facilities are offered at Kishkinda University, Ballari?
faqs.answer: Kishkinda University Ballari has a state-of-the-art infrastructure which is well-equipped and all the amenities. The University has spacious classrooms, auditorium, seminar halls, workshops, recreational activity rooms and a ground for all events and activities. Kishkinda University Ballari provides a safe and secure campus for the students, staff and faculty.

faqs.question: Does Kishkinda University, Ballari offer any placement support?
faqs.answer: Kishkinda University Ballari offers placement assistance by providing training and learning opportunities. The placement cell facilitates various skill-enhancing opportunities along with workshops and seminars to gain experience. Apart from that, KU Ballari provides various internship opportunities along with industry-oriented field trips to gain exposure. Various tie-ups and collaborations of the University facilitate placement opportunities for the graduates.

faqs.question: What are the key academic programmes offered by Kishkinda University?
faqs.answer:
Kishkinda University provides several programmes in the field of Technology, Management, Computer Applications, etc. Admission to the programmes are done on both merit and entrance basis. Some of the courses are provided via various specialisations. Students can look at the following list to about some of the popular Kishkinda University courses:
BTech
MTech
MCA
MBA

college_info.intro: Kishkinda University Ballari offers various programmes across UG, PG and Diploma levels such as BTech, MTech, BCom, BBA and BCA. University provides these courses based on the eligibility criteria of merit and entrance. reviews_list.review_title: Very good staff and good placement for marketing students.

review_content.Placements: 70% of the students were placed. But most of the company came for sales roles, and all the marketing people had more offers than others. But the package was very low for an MBA student. Other HR and IB students didn’t get that much opportunity, and they also had to interview for sales roles and select that job only.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus was good as it's for MBA and B.V.O.C. Only. It’s enough for them. There are two computer labs for students. And the library is big enough and contains all the required books. The faculties were also helpful and friendly. Overall, it was a good environment.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Professors at our institute were helpful and supportive of the students.

review_content.Placements: In our college, all the students were getting placement opportunities. Around 50–70% of college students get successfully placed in our course. 19 LPA was the highest-offered package. 3 LPA was the lowest-offered package in our course. 4–6 LPA was the average package offered in our course. The top recruiting companies in our course were HTL, Ambient, Fusion India, Accenture, Deloitte, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure was well developed and maintained for our course. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, hostel, etc., are the quality facilities offered in our course. The college also had a hostel facility in our college. Sports and other medical facilities are available for our college students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: A decent college for pursuing MBA.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides placements to around 50-60% of students. Multiple placement opportunities are given to the students. The highest placement provided was 19 LPA, and the lowest package was 3 LPA. The average package offered was 7 LPA. Top recruiting companies in our courses were Infosys, Tech Mahindra, Kotak Bank, Bajaj Finance, etc. Top roles offered were Business Associate, Finance Advisory, HR, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and quality of facilities at our college were good. The department of our course had facilities like Wi-Fi, a library, hostel, mess, canteen, halls, playgrounds, etc. Various sports activities were also organized at our college for the students. The food at the hostel mess was good.
